rule: Demo/context rows may explain why a number or signal is plausible; official finance_source and ownership_ubo claims require primary document/provider evidence with source hash or lawful gated extract.

ladder.use: Only with lawful access or client-supplied extract

ladder.closes: Finance docs, register docs, UBO workflow, cross-border
NL dossiers, positions, org tree, annual statement methods
ladder.use: Pilot if document bytes/hash and ToS are cleared
ladder.claim_level: Enrichment to primary, or primary only if source docs hashable
Enrichment unless contract grants source proof

upsell: Official claims package: attach KvK/Dataservice finance filings, lawful UBO extract or Kyckr/Sayari/Company.info evidence with document hash, then rerun Curated replay.

award_source_hard_status.source: Statista / Financial Times Europe's Fastest-Growing Companies 2026
award_source_hard_status.limitation: Closes award-context proof only; finance_source and ownership_ubo remain open blockers until primary/provider finance and ownership documents are attached.
